note: seq=123: ROOT-CAUSE AUTO-HEAL. Postgres on Hetzner is down (pg_isready rc=2, localhost:5432 no response) -> enrichment stalled at 0/min. Restart postgresql, verify it answers, then reset-failed + restart the enrichment workers so they reconnect. All steps via subprocess.run (never raises) so a name mismatch cannot halt the lane. Disk healthy (8%), so a clean restart is the correct recovery.

steps.note: seq=123: Postgres down -> restart PG then re-attach enrichment workers.

steps.cmd: /opt/atlas/venv/bin/python -c "import subprocess as s,time; s.run(['systemctl','daemon-reload']); s.run(['systemctl','reset-failed','postgresql.service','postgresql@14-main.service']); s.run(['systemctl','restart','postgresql.service']); time.sleep(8); r=s.run(['pg_isready','-h','localhost','-p','5432'],capture_output=True,text=True); print('pg_isready:',r.returncode,(r.stdout or '').strip()); [ (s.run(['systemctl','reset-failed',u]), s.run(['systemctl','restart',u])) for u in ['atlas-enrich.service','atlas-enrich-async-ramp.service','atlas-async-ramp.service'] ]; print('pg restart + enrich re-attach issued')"
